name: MCP Security Audit
purpose: Scans MCP servers for security vulnerabilities including prompt injection patterns, risky tool configurations, and misaligned capabilities. Produces audit reports with risk scores and remediation guidance.

declared.name: mcp_server_connection
declared.description: Connects to MCP servers via stdio or SSE transport to enumerate tools and resources.
declared.scope: Read-only enumeration. Does not invoke tools or modify server state.

declared.name: tool_classification
declared.description: Classifies MCP server tools by risk category (filesystem, network, code execution, etc.).
declared.scope: Static analysis of tool names, descriptions, and parameters.

declared.name: report_generation
declared.description: Generates text and JSON audit reports with findings and risk scores.
declared.scope: Writes to stdout or specified output file.

data_access.retention_policy: No data retained. Reports are stateless and written once.

behavior.escalation_policy: Exits with non-zero status code on unrecoverable errors. No autonomous retry.
